Headline: Adani Enterprises launches new websitewww.adanienterprises.com
Stock hits 52-week high of Rs 92 - strong rally in early 2016
Board announces meeting scheduled for February 1, 2016 to consider Q3 financial results
Adani Enterprises incorporates subsidiary Adani Agri Logistics (Kannauj) Ltd
Adani Enterprises incorporates wholly-owned subsidiary Korba Clean Coal Pvt Ltd for coal washing business
Stock hits 52-week low of Rs 58.45 - significant correction in early 2016
DRI (Directorate of Revenue Intelligence) initiates probe against Adani firms for alleged coal over-invoicing from Indonesia
Queensland approves Carmichael coal mine project leases - key regulatory milestone
Adani Enterprises announces deferral of Carmichael mine project by another year
Q4 FY16 Results: Consolidated net profit declines 77.37% to Rs 166.80 crore; FY16 profit down 46.56% to Rs 1,041.12 crore
FY16 revenue declines 31.8% to Rs 43,920.76 crore due to commodity cycle downturn
Annual Report FY16 published; company focused on coal, renewable energy, edible oil and city gas distribution
Renewable solar project commissioning continues; firm working towards 10,000 MW solar park ambition by 2022
Board meeting to consider Q1 FY17 (April-June 2016) results
Show cause notices issued against Adani Group entities for coal import over-valuation
DRI issues show cause notice to Adani Enterprises for alleged Rs 1,100 crore over-invoicing of Indonesian coal imports
Adani Enterprises notifies BSE regarding regulatory notices received from revenue authorities
Board announces Q2 FY17 results scheduled for announcement on October 24, 2016
Q2 FY17 Results: Consolidated income Rs 7,594 crore; EBITDA Rs 580 crore; PAT Rs 63 crore
Half-yearly FY17: Consolidated income Rs 16,513 crore; EBITDA Rs 1,387 crore; PAT Rs 427 crore
Mining volume growth 48% on half-yearly basis; Coal trading up 10% to 42.8 million tonnes
Renewable energy - 648 MW solar project fully operational; 75 MW additional capacity in Punjab
Adani Enterprises and Elbit Systems (Israel) incorporate joint venture AEASIL for manufacturing unmanned aerial vehicles
Stock gains 3.41% to Rs 65.20 after announcing UAV manufacturing joint venture with Israeli firm Elbit
Adani-Elbit Advanced Systems India (AEASIL) incorporated with 51% Adani stake and 49% Elbit stake for aerospace and defence manufacturing
Year-end 2016: Adani Enterprises Ltd emerges as largest player in multiple nation-critical business spaces
